raw_message: Hey Sam! Good to see you! Yeah, I just got back from a trip with my family in my new Prius.
message: [1]: The user was happy to be reunited with Sam after returning from a vacation with his family in their new Prius.
fact: Just arrived back from a trip
attribue: Sam happy to see his friend

raw_message: My old prius broke down, decided to get it repaired and sell it. Glad you asked, we went to Rockies, check it out. (image description: a photo of a lake with rocks and mountains in the background)
message: [3]: The user's old Prius broke down, they decided to get it repaired and sell it.
reason: To get it repaired and sell it for financial reasons
attribue: User has a job or needs financial stability
